tip_uz: Band 7 olish uchun turli xil so'z va iboralar ishlatishingiz kerak. Oddiy so'zlar o'rniga akademik so'zlarni ishlating. Bitta so'zni takrorlamang.
before_example: Many people think this is a big problem.
after_example: A considerable number of individuals regard this as a significant concern.
key_point_uz: 'Many' → 'A considerable number of', 'big' → 'significant', 'think' → 'regard' — shunday almashtirishlar ball oshiradi.

tip_uz: Band 7 da turli grammatik tuzilmalar ishlating: relative clauses, conditionals, passive voice. Faqat oddiy gaplar yozmaslik kerak.
before_example: Technology is useful. People use it every day. It saves time.
after_example: Technology, which has become an integral part of daily life, is widely regarded as a time-saving tool that enhances productivity.
key_point_uz: 3 ta oddiy gapni bitta murakkab gapga aylantirish. Relative clause ('which') va passive voice ('is regarded') ishlatildi.

tip_uz: Band 6 — asosiy fikrlarni ifodalay olish. Band 7 ga o'tish uchun fikrlaringizni CHUQURROQ tushuntiring va misollar keltiring.
before_example: Education is important for getting a good job.
after_example: Education plays a pivotal role in enhancing employment prospects, as it equips individuals with the specialized knowledge and transferable skills that employers increasingly demand in today's competitive job market.
key_point_uz: Band 6 da fikr bor, lekin yuzaki. Band 7 da fikr chuqur, tushuntirish batafsil va akademik til ishlatilgan.

tip_uz: Band 7 uchun to'xtovsiz gapiring. 'Um', 'uh', 'like' kabi to'ldiruvchi so'zlarni kamaytiring. O'rniga 'well', 'actually', 'I mean' ishlating.
before_example: Um... I think... uh... technology is... like... very important in... um... our lives.
after_example: Well, I strongly believe that technology plays a crucial role in our daily lives. Actually, it's hard to imagine a single day without relying on some form of digital device.
key_point_uz: 'Um', 'uh' o'rniga 'Well', 'Actually', 'I mean' ishlating. Bu tabiiy to'ldiruvchilar ravonlikni ko'rsatadi.

tip_uz: Band 8 da inversions, cleft sentences, va emphatic structures ishlating. Bu tuzilmalar sizning grammatik darajangizni ko'rsatadi.
before_example: Pollution causes many health problems. It is a serious issue.
after_example: Not only does pollution pose a grave threat to public health, but it also undermines the very foundations of sustainable development in both urban and rural communities.
key_point_uz: 'Not only... but also...' inversion tuzilmasi — band 8 grammatik daraja ko'rsatkichi.

tip_uz: Part 3 da idiomalar va iboralar ishlating, lekin tabiiy tarzda. Har bir javobda 1-2 ta idiomatic ifoda yetarli.
before_example: I think this is a problem that has two sides.
after_example: This issue is very much a double-edged sword, as it has both positive and negative implications that need to be carefully weighed up.
key_point_uz: 'Double-edged sword' va 'weighed up' — tabiiy idiomatic iboralar. Juda ko'p ishlatmang — 1-2 tasi yetarli.

tip_uz: Band 6.5 olish uchun asosiy grammatik xatolarni tuzating: subject-verb agreement, article usage, tense consistency.
before_example: The peoples needs better education. Government should provides free schools.
after_example: People need better education. The government should provide free schools.
key_point_uz: 'Peoples' → 'People' (already plural), 'needs' → 'need' (people = plural), 'provides' → 'provide' (after 'should' — base form).

tip_uz: Paragraflar va gaplar orasida mantiqiy bog'lanish bo'lishi kerak. Faqat bog'lovchi so'zlar emas, referencing pronouns (this, such, these) ham ishlating.
before_example: Pollution is increasing. Pollution causes health problems. People should reduce pollution.
after_example: Pollution levels are rising at an alarming rate across major cities. This trend has been linked to a significant increase in respiratory diseases among urban populations. To address this pressing issue, both governments and individuals must take decisive action to reduce harmful emissions.
key_point_uz: 'This trend' — oldingi gapga ishora. 'This pressing issue' — muammoga qayta murojaat. Bu 'cohesion' deyiladi.

tip_uz: Part 3 da oddiy javob bermang. Fikringizni asoslang, misollar keltiring, va alternativ nuqtai nazarlarni muhokama qiling.
before_example: Yes, I think technology is good for education.
after_example: I'd argue that technology has largely been beneficial for education, though the extent of its impact varies considerably. In terms of accessibility, online platforms have democratized learning by making high-quality resources available to students in remote areas. However, the effectiveness of technology-enhanced learning depends heavily on factors such as digital literacy, the quality of the content, and the availability of reliable infrastructure.
key_point_uz: Band 7.5 javob: fikr + asos + misol + cheklov. Bu chuqur fikrlashni ko'rsatadi.

tip_uz: Band 7 olish uchun 40 ta savoldan kamida 30 tasiga to'g'ri javob bering. Buning uchun Passage 1 va 2 da deyarli barcha javoblarni to'g'ri toping.
before_example: Har bir so'zni o'qib, har bir savolga ko'p vaqt sarflash → faqat 25 ta to'g'ri javob = Band 6
after_example: Skimming va scanning usullarini qo'llash, vaqtni to'g'ri boshqarish → 30-32 ta to'g'ri javob = Band 7
key_point_uz: Band 7 = 30-32/40 to'g'ri javob. Passage 1 (13/13), Passage 2 (11/13), Passage 3 (8/14) — bu real maqsad.

tip_uz: Band 7 uchun 40 ta savoldan kamida 30 tasiga to'g'ri javob bering. Section 1 va 2 da barcha javoblarni to'g'ri toping, Section 3 va 4 da kamida yarmisini.
before_example: Savollarni oldindan o'qimaslik, signal so'zlarga e'tibor bermaslik → 24 to'g'ri javob = Band 6
after_example: Savollarni oldindan o'qish, kalit so'zlarni belgilash, signal so'zlarga e'tibor berish → 30-32 to'g'ri javob = Band 7
key_point_uz: Band 7 = 30-32/40. Section 1 (10/10), Section 2 (9/10), Section 3 (6/10), Section 4 (5/10) — real maqsad.

tip_uz: Band 8 uchun savolning BARCHA qismlariga to'liq javob bering. Har bir fikringiz aniq, chuqur va misollar bilan qo'llab-quvvatlangan bo'lishi kerak.
before_example:
Topic: Some people think zoos are cruel. Others believe they serve a purpose. Discuss.

Weak response: 'Zoos are both good and bad. Some people like them and some don't.'
after_example: Strong response: 'While animal welfare advocates argue that confining wild animals to artificial habitats is inherently unethical, conservationists contend that modern zoos play an indispensable role in breeding programs for endangered species. A nuanced examination reveals that the morality of zoos hinges largely on the standards of care provided and the conservation outcomes achieved.'
key_point_uz: Band 8 = savolning BARCHA qismlariga chuqur javob + har bir fikr uchun aniq misol va tushuntirish.

tip_uz: Band 6 da qolib ketishning asosiy sabablari: takroriy so'zlar, qisqa javoblar, grammatik xatolar. Bu xatolarni tuzating!
before_example:
Q: Do you like reading?
A: Yes, I like reading. I read books. Books are good. I like many books.
after_example:
Q: Do you like reading?
A: Absolutely, I'm quite passionate about reading. I try to set aside at least half an hour each day to read, usually before bedtime. I'm particularly drawn to historical fiction because it allows me to learn about different eras while enjoying a compelling narrative.
key_point_uz: Band 6 javob qisqa va takroriy. Band 7+ javob batafsil, turli so'zlar bilan va sabablar bilan.

tip_uz: Har bir paragraf aniq tuzilmaga ega bo'lishi kerak: topic sentence → supporting details → example → concluding/linking sentence.
before_example: Technology helps students. Many students use computers. The internet has information. Schools should have technology.
after_example: One of the primary benefits of integrating technology into education is the enhanced access to learning resources it provides. Students can now access a vast repository of academic materials, ranging from scholarly articles to interactive simulations, with just a few clicks. For instance, platforms like Khan Academy offer free, high-quality courses that students in remote areas can utilize. Consequently, technology has the potential to bridge the educational gap between urban and rural communities.
key_point_uz: Topic sentence + tushuntirish + misol + xulosa — bu PEEL tuzilmasi. Band 7 uchun SHART.

tip_uz: Band 7.5 uchun less common vocabulary va collocations ishlating. Sinonimlar o'rniga aniq va mos so'zlarni tanlang.
before_example: The government should make rules to stop pollution. This will help the environment.
after_example: The government ought to implement stringent environmental regulations to curb industrial emissions. Such measures would significantly contribute to the preservation of natural ecosystems.
key_point_uz: 'Make rules' → 'implement regulations', 'stop' → 'curb', 'help' → 'contribute to the preservation of' — bu band 7.5 leksik daraja.

tip_uz: Band 8 uchun talaffuz aniq, intonatsiya tabiiy va urg'u to'g'ri joyda bo'lishi kerak. Kalit so'zlarga urg'u bering.
before_example: Monotone: 'I think technology is important because it helps people in many ways.'
after_example: With intonation: 'I THINK technology is imPORtant because it helps people in MANY ways.' — Kalit so'zlarga urg'u bering, savollarda intonatsiyani ko'taring.
key_point_uz: Kalit so'zlarga urg'u bering (content words). Function words (a, the, is) ga urg'u bermang. Tabiiy intonatsiya = yuqori ball.

tip_uz: Task 1 da BARCHA raqamlarni yozishga harakat qilmang. Eng muhim ma'lumotlarni tanlang: eng yuqori, eng past, eng katta o'zgarish.
before_example: In 2010, it was 25%. In 2011, it was 27%. In 2012, it was 30%. In 2013, it was 28%. In 2014, it was 35%...
after_example: Between 2010 and 2020, the figure rose steadily from 25% to approximately 50%, with the most dramatic increase occurring between 2014 and 2016, when it surged from 35% to 45%.
key_point_uz: Har bir yilni alohida yozish — band 6. Tendensiyalarni ko'rsatib, muhim nuqtalarni ta'kidlash — band 7+.

tip_uz: Part 2 da 1-2 daqiqa gapirish kerak. Cue card dagi BARCHA nuqtalarga javob bering. 1 daqiqa tayyorgarlik vaqtida kalit so'zlar yozing.
before_example: I want to talk about a book. It was a good book. I read it last month. I liked it because it was interesting. That's all.
after_example: I'd like to describe a book I read recently... (What) It was called Atomic Habits by James Clear. (When) I read it about two months ago during my summer break. (Why) I decided to pick it up because several friends had recommended it. (Your feelings) What particularly impressed me was how the author uses scientific evidence to explain how small daily habits can lead to remarkable long-term changes...
key_point_uz: Cue card dagi har bir nuqtaga javob bering. 1.5-2 daqiqa gapiring. Qisqa to'xtab qolmang!

tip_uz: Band 7.5 olish uchun o'qish tezligini oshiring. Har kuni 1 ta IELTS passage o'qib, 20 daqiqa ichida barcha savollarga javob bering.
before_example: Sekin o'qish: Har bir so'zni alohida o'qish, lug'atga ko'p qarab, 30+ daqiqa sarflash → Band 6.5
after_example: Tez o'qish: Skimming + scanning, noma'lum so'zlarni kontekstdan tushunish, 18-20 daqiqa ichida javob berish → Band 7.5
key_point_uz: Band 7.5 = 33-34/40. Har kuni mashq qiling. Tezlikni oshirish uchun vaqt chegarasi bilan o'qing.

tip_uz: Article xatolari — eng keng tarqalgan grammatik xato. 'The', 'a/an' va article ishlatmaslik qoidalarini yaxshi bilib oling.
before_example: Education is important. Government should invest in education. The children need good education.
after_example: Education is of paramount importance in today's society. Governments should invest heavily in public education systems to ensure that all children receive a high-quality education.
key_point_uz: 'Education' (umumiy) — article yo'q. 'The education system' (aniq) — 'the' kerak. 'A high-quality education' — sifatlanganda 'a' kerak.

tip_uz: Band 8 da bir tomonlama fikr yozmang. Masalaning murakkabligini ko'rsating va turli tomonlarini muhokama qiling.
before_example: Technology is good. It helps everyone. We should use more technology.
after_example: While technology has undeniably revolutionized numerous aspects of contemporary life, from healthcare diagnostics to educational accessibility, it would be naive to overlook the inherent risks it poses. The proliferation of digital surveillance, algorithmic bias, and screen addiction suggests that technological advancement must be accompanied by robust ethical frameworks and informed public discourse.
key_point_uz: Band 8 = muammoning murakkabligini ko'rsatish. 'While... it would be naive to overlook...' — bu nuanced argument.

tip_uz: Band 6.5 olish uchun 'um', 'uh', 'you know' kabi fillerlarni kamaytiring. Ular o'rniga qisqa pauza bering yoki tabiiy fillerlar ishlating.
before_example: Um... well... you know... I think... uh... that, like, technology is, um... changing things.
after_example: Well, I believe that technology is fundamentally transforming the way we live and work. Let me think... One significant example would be how artificial intelligence is reshaping the healthcare industry.
key_point_uz: 'Well', 'Let me think', 'That's an interesting question' — bu tabiiy fillerlar. 'Um', 'uh' — bu band pasaytiradi.

tip_uz: Audio eshitayotganda qisqa notalar yozing. To'liq so'zlar emas, qisqartmalar ishlating. Keyinroq ularni to'liq javobga aylantiring.
before_example: Audio eshitish va hech narsa yozmaslik, keyin javoblarni eslab qolishga harakat qilish → ko'p javobni unutish
after_example: Audio eshitish va tezkor notalar yozish: 'lib → Mon-Fri, 9-5, Sat 10-2' → keyin to'liq javob: 'The library is open Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm, and Saturday 10am to 2pm.'
key_point_uz: Qisqartmalar ishlating: → = leads to, ↑ = increase, ↓ = decrease, w/ = with, b/c = because.

tip_uz: Xato qilsangiz, o'zingizni tuzating! Bu YAXSHI narsa — bu sizning til darajangizni ko'rsatadi. Faqat tez tuzating va davom eting.
before_example: Xatoni tuzatmaslik: 'He go to school every day... (xato qolib ketdi)'
after_example: Xatoni tuzatish: 'He go... sorry, he GOES to school every day.' yoki 'The informations... I mean, the INFORMATION suggests that...'
key_point_uz: O'z xatolaringizni sezish va tuzatish — band 7.5+ ko'rsatkichi. Lekin har bir gapda tuzatmang — bu ravonlikka zarar!

tip_uz: Band 7 uchun kamida 5 xil gap tuzilmasidan foydalaning: simple, compound, complex, compound-complex va conditional.
before_example: People use social media. It is popular. Many people like it. It connects people.
after_example:
Simple: Social media is immensely popular worldwide.
Compound: Many people use social media daily, and it has fundamentally altered communication patterns.
Complex: Although social media connects people globally, it can lead to feelings of isolation.
Conditional: If governments regulated social media more strictly, privacy concerns might be significantly reduced.
key_point_uz: Turli gap tuzilmalari = Grammatical Range and Accuracy ball oshadi. Faqat oddiy gaplar = Band 6 da qolasiz.

tip_uz: Band 8 olish uchun 40 ta savoldan 35-36 tasiga to'g'ri javob bering. Passage 3 dagi eng qiyin savollarni ham to'g'ri javoblash kerak.
before_example: Passage 3 dagi inference va writer's view savollarini taxmin bilan javoblash → 30/40 = Band 7
after_example: Passage 3 dagi murakkab savollarni chuqur tushunish va to'g'ri javoblash → 35-36/40 = Band 8
key_point_uz: Band 8 = 35-36/40. Passage 3 da kamida 10-11 ta to'g'ri javob. Inference savollarini mashq qiling!

tip_uz: Band 6.5 da eng ko'p yo'qotiladigan ballar: spelling xatolar, run-on sentences, va noto'g'ri so'z tanlash.
before_example: The goverment should definately take mesures to adress this issue, because its effecting many peoples lifes.
after_example: The government should definitely take measures to address this issue, because it is affecting many people's lives.
key_point_uz: 'goverment' → 'government', 'definately' → 'definitely', 'mesures' → 'measures', 'its' → 'it is', 'peoples lifes' → 'people's lives'.

tip_uz: Band 7 da har bir javobingizni rivojlantiring: fikr → sabab → misol → natija. 'I think X because Y, for example Z, which means...'
before_example:
Q: Is public transport important?
A: Yes, it is important. People use it.
after_example:
Q: Is public transport important?
A: Absolutely. Public transport is vital for several reasons. Firstly, it significantly reduces traffic congestion, which is a major problem in most major cities. For instance, cities like London and Tokyo have invested heavily in their metro systems, and as a result, they've managed to keep their roads relatively uncongested despite having enormous populations. Beyond that, public transport is considerably more environmentally friendly than private vehicles, as a single bus can replace dozens of cars on the road.
key_point_uz: Fikr + sabab + misol + natija — bu PEEL tuzilmasi. Speaking da ham ishlaydi!

tip_uz: Band 7.5+ uchun fikrlaringizning kuchini boshqaring: hedging (yumshatish) va boosting (kuchaytirish) texnikalarini ishlating.
before_example: Social media causes depression in all teenagers.
after_example:
Hedging: 'Social media may contribute to depressive symptoms in certain adolescents, particularly those who spend excessive amounts of time on platforms that promote social comparison.'

Boosting: 'There is compelling evidence to suggest that unchecked social media usage is inextricably linked to rising rates of anxiety among young people.'
key_point_uz: Hedging: may, might, could, tend to, in some cases. Boosting: compelling, undeniably, unequivocally, inextricably.

tip_uz: Bir paragraf ichida vaqt shakllari (tense) bir-biriga mos bo'lishi kerak. O'tmish haqida yozsangiz, past tense ishlatish bo'ylab davom eting.
before_example: The graph shows that sales increased in 2020. In 2021, they are decreasing. By 2022, they will reach the lowest point.
after_example: The graph shows that sales increased in 2020. In 2021, they decreased significantly. By 2022, they had reached the lowest point of the entire period.
key_point_uz: O'tmish ma'lumotlari uchun past tense ishlating. Hozirgi tendensiyalar uchun present tense. Aralashtirmang!

tip_uz: Band 8 uchun Part 3 da mavhum tushunchalarni muhokama qiling. Falsafiy va nazariy fikrlar bildiring.
before_example:
Q: What is success?
A: Success means having money and a good job.
after_example:
Q: What is success?
A: That's a profound question, and I think the definition of success is highly subjective and culturally influenced. In many Western societies, success is often equated with material wealth and career achievement. However, I'd argue that true success encompasses a much broader spectrum — it includes personal fulfilment, meaningful relationships, and a sense of contribution to society. The ancient Greek concept of 'eudaimonia' — flourishing or well-being — perhaps captures this more holistic view of success better than any modern definition.
key_point_uz: Band 8 = mavhum tushunchalarni chuqur muhokama qilish. Turli qarashlarni ko'rsatish va akademik atamalar ishlatish.
